3244370.name: Bounty Fusion
3244370.description:
Power up your Mech and prepare to hunt down all of the galaxy’s deadliest bounties!

Inspired by the golden age of mecha anime, Bounty Fusion is set in a gritty future where criminals run the system.

Fight back by choosing your favourite mech to scour the bounty’s star systems in search of deadly criminals. Explore freely, but watch your back! Each sector hides dangers, merchants, mysterious gates, and strange encounters with the locals. Every choice can tip the balance between success and failure.

Build your deck and fuse cards endlessly, creating wildly powerful combinations for overwhelming attacks and devastating effects. Break all the rules and fuse the most powerful cards into legendary weapons.

Explore the galaxy to find strange inhabitants in all corners, some have bounties on their heads, some sell black market tech, some run jump-gates to far away locales.

Key Features:

  • Unlimited Card Fusion: Fuse any card, even previously fused ones, for massive power and unique combo effects.

  • Free Exploration: Chart your course through each system’s points of interest, combat zones, merchants, gates, and anomalies.

  • Lost Technologies: Equip rare tech to upgrade your mech with powerful passive boosts and surprises.

  • Rank Up: Climb the bounty ranks to unlock new mechs, cards, and technologies.

  • Re-suit: Failed a mission? Retry with a rebuilt deck. Success means it’s time for the next bounty.'

Crush contracts. Fuse everything. Claim the galaxy
3244370.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 简体中文

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
